query: SELECT w.id, w.accountId, a.name as accountName, w.name as workflowName, w.triggerType, w.isActive, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_steps ws WHERE ws.workflowId = w.id) as stepCount FROM workflows w JOIN accounts a ON w.accountId = a.id WHERE w.accountId IN (450002, 390025, 420001) AND w.id >= 390001 ORDER BY w.accountId, w.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute SELECT w.id, w.accountId, a.name as accountName, w.name as workflowName, w.triggerType, w.isActive, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_steps ws WHERE ws.workflowId = w.id) as stepCount FROM workflows w JOIN accounts a ON w.accountId = a.id WHERE w.accountId IN (450002, 390025, 420001) AND w.id >= 390001 ORDER BY w.accountId, w.id;
